questions.question: What is the primary purpose of Experiment 1 in the IPCC?
options: To create a Bayesian network from scratch
To read a dataset from the user and infer
To train a machine learning model
To visualize the structure of a network
questions.explanation: To read a dataset from the user and infer

questions.question: What type of inference is being approximated in Experiment 1?
options: Exact inference
Approximate inference
Conditional inference
Inference by elimination

options: To create a Bayesian network from scratch
To read a dataset from the user and infer

To visualize the structure of a network

questions.question: What is the primary goal of making a Bayesian network in Experiment 1?
options: To create a network from scratch
To train a model on existing data
To infer missing values in a dataset
To visualize the structure of a network

options: Exact inference
Approximate inference
Conditional inference
